pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. it’s like the air itself is heavy. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to see him sitting there, but it’s just nothing. just empty space. i dont even know why i bother waking up and doing the dishes or making coffee when he isn't here to have any with me. everything feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space tonight and it just hit me how much of a joke everything is. like, in a few billion years the sun dies, then the stars go out, and it’s just cold and empty forever. all this stuff we do, all the pain and the struggling... it doesn't actually matter. it's just noise before the silence. feels pretty pointless when you really think about it.

pool.baseline: the candles are all burned down to nothing... just like everything else. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone walls. i feel like i'm just a ghost already, wandering through these rooms where love used to live. i don't see the point in waiting for a morning that only brings more emptiness. i just want to let the shadows take me. it feels so much more peaceful than fighting anymore.

pool.baseline: i spent fifteen years on this theory. everything. every paper, every late night, every person i pushed away to make it happen... it was all based on a fundamental error. it's not even just a mistake, it's like i've been hallucinating my whole career. i look in the mirror and i don't even see a person, just a fraud. what's even the point of staying around when there's nothing left of me?
